text.content: Come visit MAXAM at the National Farm Machinery show in Booth #7665

rich_text.plain_text: Come visit MAXAM at the National Farm Machinery show in Booth #7665

text.content: Location - Kentucky Exposition Center, Louisville, KY

rich_text.plain_text: Location - Kentucky Exposition Center, Louisville, KY

text.content:
The National Farm Machinery Show has offered the most complete selection of cutting-edge agricultural products, equipment and services available in the farming industry. Business professionals from around the world gain knowledge and hands-on access to various technological advancements needed for the upcoming farming season during the four-day show.

MAXAM will be showcasing our all new RowXtra product, designed for balers, hay mergers, seeders, and more. Stop by to also see the VF420/95R50 AgriXtra N and the VF580/85R42 AgriXtra 85.

text.content: We'll be at booth #7665 - see you there!
